name: Theorem Contagion

levelStats: Standing in a zone created by a Residual Arcane creates a globe that orbits the player every 2s. The globes will strike the nearest enemy within 15m dealing 150 damage increasing their vulnerability to the globe's damage type by 25% for 6s. Globes will persist for 30s upon leaving the zone.

Standing in a zone created by a Residual Arcane creates a globe that orbits the player every 2s. The globes will strike the nearest enemy within 15m dealing 150 damage increasing their vulnerability to the globe's damage type by 50% for 6s. Globes will persist for 30s upon leaving the zone.

Standing in a zone created by a Residual Arcane creates a globe that orbits the player every 2s. The globes will strike the nearest enemy within 15m dealing 150 damage increasing their vulnerability to the globe's damage type by 100% for 6s. Globes will persist for 30s upon leaving the zone.
